# Description

<!-- What does this pull request change, and why? Keep it focused. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] Tooling / config (`chore`)
- [ ] Tests (`test`)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe how you verified the change. Commands run, screens checked, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `develop` and targeting `develop`
- [ ] Backend builds: `cd backend && mvn clean package`
- [ ] Frontend builds: `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Any schema change is a new Flyway migration (no edits to applied migrations)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour or setup changed
